description_long: This is a classic outdoor bench featuring a slatted wooden seat and backrest, supported by ornate black cast iron legs and frame. The seat consists of a grid of wooden slats, providing both comfort and durability, while the backrest is made of horizontal wooden planks. The legs and side supports are intricately designed with decorative scrollwork, giving the bench a vintage, elegant appearance. The bench is wide enough to accommodate multiple people and is designed to be both sturdy and visually appealing. The materials and construction suggest it is intended for public spaces such as parks or sidewalks. The overall finish is smooth with a slight sheen on the wood and a matte black finish on the metal.
description: A vintage-style outdoor bench with a slatted wooden seat and backrest, supported by ornate black cast iron legs and frame.
description_view_0: Side view showing the thickness of the wooden slats and the decorative black cast iron frame.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the horizontal wooden backrest slats and the grid-patterned wooden seat.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, again showing the ornate cast iron frame and the profile of the wooden slats.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the back of the wooden slats and the supporting cast iron structure.
attribute_leg_design: ornate black cast iron side supports with decorative scrollwork
